benefits.description: Lost quite a bit of weight since June

side_effects.description: Multiple fluid-filled nodules and cysts at subcutaneous injection sites on abdomen; later determined to be fat necrosis and oil cysts from prior radiation therapy, not directly related to peptide injections

protocol_notes: Subcutaneous injections to abdomen using sterile insulin needles. Initially mixing with 100 units of diluent per vial; later adjusted based on physician recommendation. Eventually switched injection sites to upper arm, buttocks, or glute to avoid abdominal sensitivity. Post-update reveals nodules likely caused by fat necrosis from prior abdominal radiation therapy (ended 2 years prior), not peptide injections.
